00

Who Am I

I'm Lauren!

I'm optimizing for curiosity and happiness through sidequests and meaningful work. I want to know more about everything. I believe that with intention, knowledge and understanding compound and lead to fulfillment and fun.

january [2025-01]

01

Art

Painting to capture the big chapters of my life. Use the arrows to browse, or click the image to view full screen.

02

Writing

I want to write a book (or many) someday, but for now I write my life into personal essays that help me understand my experience of the world!

My current journal has this message on the front cover: "The book is an extension of memory and imagination"

I also want to write a fashion blog (please collab with me).

aftersun (2025)花樣年華mercurial worldthe best air mattress in the worlddrafts

High Tide by Jan Toorop

My favorite painting!

03

Favorites

  • Essays about frames, fashion, movies, and making stuff
  • Books that let me experience a world I wouldn't have otherwise known
  • Love songs with some angst and yearning (also Irish music)
  • Movies that I rate 5 stars
04

Sidequests

Exploring

Some of my favourite places I've been to are: NYC, Dublin, the Residenzschloss Museum in Dresden, Fes, Montpellier, Mabul Island, Ipoh, Datong, and the top of Mt Brunswick.

Sports

I love playing volleyball, snowboarding, dragonboating, swimming, and hiking. I want to play tennis.

Languages

I spend a solid amount of time trying to learn to become literate in Chinese and proficient in spoken Mandarin. I always watch movies and shows with French or Spanish subtitles.

Hobbies

I'm always sunrise and sunset chasing, and I think that sunlight and shadows on stuff makes the best photos. I like baking, and I'm often learning new songs on the guitar and piano.
